creator: intron@intron.ac
text:
The port net/skype:
No need to type "skype --resource..." any longer.
Just type "skype" to start it in terminal.

Fix: 

Patch:   http://ftp.intron.ac/tmp/skype.diff

In Makefile, a wrapper /usr/local/bin/skype is created on fly.
The file "pkg-message.in" is unnecessary and deleted.
